# Changelog
All notable changes. Follows [Keep a Changelog](#) · Semantic Versioning.

data.row_natural_language_text:
Version: **Unreleased**, Date: —, Highlights: Dark mode, CSV export, token refresh fix, Types: Added
Changed
cells: Dark mode, CSV export, token refresh fix

data.row_natural_language_text:
Version: **v2.4.0**, Date: 2026-05-12, Highlights: Webhook retry queue, multi-tenant Slack routing, Python 3.12, Types: Added
Changed
Fixed
Deprecated
cells: Webhook retry queue, multi-tenant Slack routing, Python 3.12

data.row_natural_language_text: Version: **v2.3.1**, Date: 2026-04-01, Highlights: Calendar timezone fix, MongoDB O(n²) regression, Types: Fixed
cells: Calendar timezone fix, MongoDB O(n²) regression

data.row_natural_language_text:
Version: **v2.3.0**, Date: 2026-03-18, Highlights: Salesforce Lead conversion, Zoom Docs toolset, Types: Added
Changed
Removed
cells: Salesforce Lead conversion, Zoom Docs toolset

data.row_natural_language_text:
Version: **v2.2.0**, Date: 2026-02-10, Highlights: Teams meeting discovery, OneDrive modernisation, Types: Added
Fixed
Version: **v1.0.0**, Date: 2025-11-01, Highlights: Initial public release, Types: Added

blocks.data: Dark mode support across all dashboard views
Export to CSV for analytics reports
Improved token refresh logic to reduce 401 errors on slow connections
Webhook retry queue with exponential backoff (max 5 attempts)
Support for multi-tenant Slack app routing via shared signing secrets
Python async service layer upgraded from Python 3.10 → 3.12
`SignatureDoesNotMatch` 403 from Content-Type mismatch in S3 presigned URL uploads [#412](#)
OneDrive `sharedWithMe` pagination silently dropping items beyond page 2 [#398](#)
`legacy_auth` flag in connector config — will be removed in v3.0.0
Recurring calendar events failing silently when `recurrenceTimeZone` was missing from PATCH body
MongoDB aggregation pipeline performance regression in archived conversations controller (was O(n²), now O(n log n))
Salesforce connector: Lead conversion via `convertLead` invocable action with Tooling API fallback
Zoom Docs toolset: create, read, update, delete operations
`isExternal` field filtering in ArangoDB and Neo4j queries for legacy document compatibility
Zoom transcript endpoint corrected from `/meetings/{id}/recordings/transcript` to `/meetings/{id}/recordings`
HMAC signature verification for all inbound webhooks
